tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.block: Xuanhuan environment block: foundation for qi, alchemy, talismans and arrays.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.block.use: Right-click to read the local qi reaction.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.machine.bl: Cultivation station: right-click to open. Portable stations work alone; array structures become stronger when built out.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.meditation: Portable cultivation aid: sit for full efficiency, extra qi gathering and continuous meditation. The configurable panel key also works without a cushion.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.material.r: Xuanhuan material used in crafting, alchemy, talismans, array conversion, qi recovery and JEI lookup.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.spirit_com: Detects local qi concentration so new players can understand the resource layer.
Right-click: shows local qi grade and value.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.qi_guiding: Starter cultivation method: converts ambient qi into the shared mana value.
Right-click to practice. First use raises the qi-route mana cap; later uses restore mana.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.bigu_manua: Starter fasting method: does not delete hunger, but lowers food pressure and keeps a small buffer.
Right-click to practice. With Earth Human installed, this improves hunger pressure automatically.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.body_tempe: Starter body tempering: improves tolerance, fatigue recovery and temperature stress resistance.
Right-click to practice. With Earth Human installed, this improves fatigue, hydration and temperature pressure.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.fetal_brea: Starter inner breathing: uses qi to regulate breath rhythm and extend underwater air.
Right-click to practice. With Earth Human installed, this adds extra air capacity.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.spirit_spr: Portable spirit spring sample for alchemy, spirit soil and arrays.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.spirit_gra: A basic spirit plant produced when ordinary ecology is infused with qi.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.cinnabar_s: Talisman ink made from cinnabar-like pigment, ink and spiritual powder.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.talisman_p: A blank carrier made from paper, gold dust and thread. Combine it with cinnabar spirit ink at a Talisman Table to inscribe and seal qi.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.basic_tali: A pre-charged single-use ward. Activation costs only 1 mana and grants brief Strength and Resistance.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.spirit_cry: Spiritual crystal shard for arrays, artifacts and furnace upgrades.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.spirit_iro: An artifact blank made by refining ordinary iron with qi.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.qi_recover: Right-click to restore mana immediately. Unlike meditation, it does not drain the local chunk.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.machine.al: Refines spirit grass, spring water and crystal shards into usable pills.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.machine.ta: Stores a large amount of ambient qi in drawn talisman paper; the finished talisman needs only a tiny trigger cost.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.machine.sp: Works alone as a portable array. Add spirit soil on the four sides and vein/spring foci on the corners to form a full 3x3 array.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.compass.hi: Hint: spirit veins, springs, soil and formed spirit arrays raise qi. Repeated meditation can temporarily drain this chunk.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.arcana.sta: Mana: %s/%s (qi route +%s, magic route +%s; both routes can be trained together and add up).
You understood the Qi Guiding Manual: ambient qi can now become shared mana.
You circulate the Qi Guiding Manual and reinforce the qi route.
You just meditated. Rest your breath for %s seconds. Pills recover instantly, crystals consume materials, and meditation drains local qi.
Qi source: %s; this chunk is now %s/45 depleted and will recover over time.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.bigu_manua: You understood the Fasting Primer: qi now reduces hunger pressure.
You review the Fasting Primer and stabilize the fasting rhythm.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.body_tempe: You understood Body Tempering: tolerance, fatigue recovery and temperature resistance improved.
You circulate Body Tempering and continue strengthening tolerance.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.fetal_brea: You understood Inner Breath: underwater air and breathing capacity improved.
You review Inner Breath and stabilize your breathing rhythm.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.cultivatio: Body adaptation: fasting %s, tempering +%s, extra air +%s ticks, endurance +%s.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.block.spir: Spirit vein resonance: %s (%s/100). It raises nearby chunk qi and can serve as a corner focus for a full spirit array.
The spring stone feels clear and moist: %s (%s/100). It raises nearby qi and supports spirit spring bottle and alchemy routes.
Spirit soil is nourishing plants: %s (%s/100). It raises nearby qi and serves as the side medium for a full spirit array.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.block.alch: Alchemy furnace placed: %s (%s/100). Right-click to open its alchemy screen.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.block.tali: Talisman table opened: %s (%s/100). Right-click to open its talisman screen.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.block.spir: Portable spirit array located qi: %s (%s/100). Right-click to open array processing; build the 3x3 pattern to form a full array.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.qi_pill.us: You take a qi recovery pill and restore +%s mana; current %s/%s.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.qi_pill.fu: Mana and body status need no recovery (%s/%s); no pill was consumed.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.talisman.u: The stored qi is released; only %s mana was spent to trigger it. Current mana: %s/%s.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.talisman.m: You need only %s mana to trigger this talisman, but currently have %s/%s. The talisman was not consumed.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.human_reco: Earth Human link: fatigue -%s, torso/limb healing total +%s.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.meditation: You sit on the cushion and open the cultivation view. Select a learned focus for each recovery cycle; press Shift to leave.
Someone is already meditating on this cushion.
You complete your first qi guiding session on the cushion. It is steadier than reading while standing.
You meditate on the cushion. Breath slows as qi circulates through torso and limbs.
Local qi: %s (%s/100), mana +%s; fatigue -%s, body healing +%s.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.practice.l: You complete your first qi-guiding cycle without a support facility. Basic cultivation is now available; cushions and arrays only improve efficiency.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.practice.u: You complete one circulation cycle where you stand. Free practice works anywhere but is less efficient than cushion meditation.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.practice.l: You complete your first qi-guiding cycle on a cushion, where stable posture makes circulation more complete.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.practice.u: The cushion stabilizes breath and posture while qi completes a cycle through torso and limbs.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.practice.r: Local qi: %s (%s/100), mana +%s; fatigue -%s, body healing +%s; method efficiency %s%%.
screen.earth_online_xuanhuan.machine.uns: This material is not valid for this cultivation station
screen.earth_online_xuanhuan.machine.mis: Insert both a primary material and a catalyst
screen.earth_online_xuanhuan.machine.inv: These materials do not form a recipe for this station
screen.earth_online_xuanhuan.machine.red: Paused by the current redstone mode
screen.earth_online_xuanhuan.machine.rol: Pill furnace: load medicine above and solvent below
Talisman desk: paper on the left, cinnabar ink on the right
Spirit array: two material nodes feed the central eye
screen.earth_online_xuanhuan.structure.a: Full spirit array formed: -12 requirement, faster work
Portable spirit array: 3x3 pattern upgrades it
Pattern: portable array center, spirit soil on four sides, spirit vein nodes or spring stones on four corners. Formed parts open the center.
screen.earth_online_xuanhuan.redstone.al: Works whenever input, output space and qi are valid.
screen.earth_online_xuanhuan.redstone.re: Processes only while receiving redstone signal.
Stops while powered and works when unpowered.
screen.earth_online_xuanhuan.redstone.to: Click the lower-right icon to cycle redstone behavior.
screen.earth_online_xuanhuan.handbook.su: Cultivation, pills, talismans, arrays and shared mana
screen.earth_online_xuanhuan.cultivation: Perform one basic cycle at your current position. It uses local qi and has a cooldown, but requires no cushion.
End continuous meditation and leave the cushion. Shift also works while seated.
Balanced ambient qi absorption with steady mana and body recovery.
Trades mana efficiency for stronger fatigue and limb recovery.
Regulates breathing, restores air and grants brief water breathing.
Uses qi to sustain metabolism, restoring a little food and fatigue.
Learn the matching manual before selecting this focus.
hud.earth_online_xuanhuan.meditation.hin: Shift to leave · Stay seated to continue
recipe.earth_online_xuanhuan.machine.her: Temper spirit grass in spring water and collect qi pills
recipe.earth_online_xuanhuan.machine.cry: Dissolve a spirit crystal in spring water and finish at high heat
recipe.earth_online_xuanhuan.machine.cha: Inscribe cinnabar ink and seal ambient qi into talisman paper
recipe.earth_online_xuanhuan.machine.spi: Temper iron and spirit crystal together in the array eye
Use spring water to cultivate spirit grass in spirit soil
recipe.earth_online_xuanhuan.machine.geo: Condense spirit spring water around a geological catalyst
recipe.earth_online_xuanhuan.machine.con: Use a mana conductor to guide spirit tempering through iron
jei.earth_online_xuanhuan.handbook.1: Right-click the Qi Guiding Manual to open the handbook and practice.
jei.earth_online_xuanhuan.handbook.2: Alchemy Furnace, Talisman Table and Portable Spirit Array each have JEI categories; the array can form a full 3x3 structure.
jei.earth_online_xuanhuan.handbook.3: If a station does not run, check input, output space, redstone mode and local qi.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.block.fiel: Field reading: main source %s; chunk depletion %s/45.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.spirit_bea: Raise affinity to 3 with spirit grass, then use the seal to form a contract.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.beast.affi: Spirit beast affinity: %s/%s. Use a seal when affinity is full.
Affinity is too low: %s/%s. Feed spirit grass first.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.beast.cont: A contract has been formed with %s. Right-click with an empty hand to change its mode.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.settlement: This is the anchor for %s. Residents initialize after the chunk is safely loaded.
